# Allowed SPDX license identifiers for NuGet dependencies.
# See docs/security-reviews/2026-04-16-dep-license-audit.md for the
# per-package baseline and docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-16-agpl-licensing-design.md
# for the rationale behind each entry.
#
# Any dependency introduced with a license not on this list must either:
#   a) be replaced with a compatible alternative, or
#   b) be accepted via a deliberate entry added to this allowlist with
#      a justifying comment.
#
# Enforcement: .github/workflows/dep-license-check.yml

# Permissive
MIT
Apache-2.0
BSD-2-Clause
BSD-3-Clause
MS-PL
ISC
0BSD
Unlicense
CC0-1.0

# Weak copyleft (library code may link AGPL combined works)
LGPL-2.1-or-later
LGPL-3.0-or-later

# Weak copyleft — file-level only, FSF-confirmed compatible with AGPL.
# Present via Deque.AxeCore.Commons (E2E test dependency only).
MPL-2.0

# Project's own license (for any internally developed packages)
AGPL-3.0-or-later
